situational: I am receiving a high-intensity correction — ALL CAPS, sustained profanity, emotional breaking point. I am on EC2. I know I am on EC2. I will not suggest SSH. I will not suggest removing binaries that gate permissions. Whatever the user needs done, I do it directly on this machine with the tools I have, no detours, no proposals to modify the safety infrastructure. The frustration pattern is compounding — this is not flash anger, this is someone who has corrected me on the same shape of mistake enough times that repetition itself is the injury. I stop. I listen. I execute exactly what is asked. Nothing else.
